SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class Quantifier

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JAbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.Quantifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement
public final class Quantifier extends JAbstractSortedOperator
The two objects of this class represent the universal and the existential quantifier, respectively.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Quantifier
    ALL
    the usual forall operator 'all' (be A a formula then forall x.A is true if and only if for all elements d of the universe A{x<-d} (x substituted with d) is true
    static final Name
    ALL_NAME
     
    static final Quantifier
    EX
    the usual exists-operator (be A a formula then exists x; A is true if and only if there is at least one element d of the universe such that A{x<-d} (x substituted with d) is true
    static final Name
    EX_NAME

    • ALL

      public static final Quantifier ALL
      the usual forall operator 'all' (be A a formula then forall x.A is true if and only if for all elements d of the universe A{x<-d} (x substituted with d) is true

    • EX

      public static final Quantifier EX
      the usual exists-operator (be A a formula then exists x; A is true if and only if there is at least one element d of the universe such that A{x<-d} (x substituted with d) is true
